verdict_headline: STOP. The Cuntz extension breaks commutativity AND breaks compatibility with any natural Hopf-coproduct (primitive or diagonal both fail the Cuntz defining relations). The natural sub-result is that O_N is a Hopf-COMODULE over the gauge U(1), NOT a Hopf-algebra. At the comodule level the M1/M2/M3 partition is trivially preserved (each S_{(n,l),k} carries a fixed k label), but at the Hopf-COPRODUCT level there is no natural choice that satisfies the Cuntz relations. Sub-result on JLO: phi_1 is structurally NON-ZERO on the Cuntz extension (the vanishing argument of Sub-Sprint 1 relies on sector-orthogonality e_s e_t = delta_{st} e_s, which Cuntz isometries violate). The depth-truncated diagonal-Dirac surrogate is insufficient to extract the non-zero coefficient at theorem grade. The Cuntz extension is STRUCTURALLY INCOMPATIBLE with the v3.61.0 Track A Hopf-substrate framework as written, and does not produce a tractable non-abelian Stage-2 motivic Galois enrichment via the natural candidate coproducts.
verdict_one_line: STOP: Cuntz extension breaks compatibility with both natural Hopf-coproducts (primitive and diagonal); O_N is a Hopf-COMODULE not a Hopf-algebra; M1/M2/M3 partition is preserved only at the trivial comodule level; no tractable enrichment ingredient at this scoping step.

panel_data.diagonal_second_relation_status: Delta(sum_i S_i S_i^*) = sum_i (S_i S_i^* (x) S_i S_i^*) has ONLY the diagonal i=j terms in H (x) H; Delta(1) = 1 (x) 1 = sum_{i,j} S_i S_i^* (x) S_j S_j^*. Cross-terms missing -> INCOMPATIBLE.

phi_1_check.structural_finding: phi_1 on Cuntz extension: structurally NOT identically zero because Cuntz isometries S_i, S_j do NOT satisfy sector-orthogonality S_i S_j = delta_{ij} S_i. The vanishing argument of Sub-Sprint 1 (commutative case) RELIED on (a) e_s e_t = delta_{st} e_s and (b) [gamma, e_s] = 0. The Cuntz isometries violate (a). Consequently, the JLO degree-1 cochain has structurally non-trivial content on the Cuntz extension.
phi_1_check.honest_scope: Diagonal-Dirac surrogate trace happens to vanish at depth-truncated level (because S_i S_j paths increase length monotonically), but this is a representation-specific quirk; the FULL Camporesi-Higuchi Dirac D = Lambda + kappa A has off-diagonal action that produces non-trivial trace contributions. Computing this at theorem grade requires modelling the FULL Fock-graded representation of O_N, which is multi-year (Pimsner-Voiculescu sequence + Cuntz-Pimsner extension).
phi_1_check.verdict: phi_1 GENERICALLY non-zero on Cuntz extension; depth-truncated diagonal-Dirac surrogate insufficient to extract

M1_M2_M3_partition_check.comodule_level: M1/M2/M3 partition trivially respected (each S has fixed k label)
M1_M2_M3_partition_check.hopf_coproduct_level: NO Hopf-coproduct exists on O_N (Sections 6, 7); question moot
M1_M2_M3_partition_check.consequence: Cuntz extension does NOT lift the M1/M2/M3 partition to a non-abelian HOPF group; it preserves the partition only at the trivial COMODULE level. This is STRUCTURALLY WEAKER than Track A's commutative case, where the primitive coproduct gives a clean Hopf-algebra tensor product H_GV = H_GV^{[0]} (x) H_GV^{[1]} (x) H_GV^{[2]}.

coassociativity_free.diagonal_on_free_algebra: coassociative (S_i (x) S_i (x) S_i in both routes)
coassociativity_free.comment: Coassociativity is NOT the obstruction. The obstruction is compatibility with the Cuntz S_i^* S_j = delta_{ij} relations.

structural_summary.primitive_coproduct_status: FAILS Cuntz relations: 25/225 pair-checks pass (all 25 off-diagonals fail; diagonal also fails); S_i^* S_j = delta_{ij} not respected when Delta is extended as algebra hom.
structural_summary.diagonal_coproduct_status: PASSES first Cuntz relation (S_i^* S_j) but FAILS second (sum_i S_i S_i^* = 1) -- cross-terms i != j missing in Delta(1); O_N is not a bialgebra under diagonal coproduct.
structural_summary.comodule_structure: O_N has natural gauge U(1) COACTION; M1/M2/M3 partition trivially respected at comodule level via fixed-k generator labels. NO non-abelian Hopf-coproduct exists naturally.
structural_summary.phi_1_status: Generically NON-ZERO on Cuntz extension (Sub-Sprint 1 vanishing argument RELIES on sector-orthogonality e_s e_t = delta_{st} e_s which Cuntz isometries violate). Bit-exact extraction requires full Camporesi-Higuchi off-diagonal Dirac representation -- multi-year.
